calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2020 Off Calendar

Request For Default Prove Up Hearing For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-01-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Mansingh Chouhan, an individual, and doing business as XOXO Entertainment.
Dept. 514. Judge: Charlene Padovani Kiesselbach. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Christopher B. Good, Esq. appeared for plaintiff AEG Presents SF, LLC (formerly known as AEG Live SF, LLC) a Delaware limited liability corporation.
Jason Bernstein, Senior Counsel for plaintiff AEG Presents SF, LLC, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Good and Bernstein appeared via ZOOM for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Mansingh Chouhan, an individual, and doing business as XOXO Entertainment.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract and Breach of the Covenant of Good Faith and Fair Dealing was filed on October 12, 2018.
Substitute service on defendant Mansingh Chouhan occurred on September 17, 2019, and was effectuated on September 28, 2019.
Default was entered on November 5, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on January 28, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff AEG Presents SF, LLC (formerly known as AEG Live SF, LLC) a Delaware limited liability corporation, and against the defaulted defendant Mansingh Chouhan, an individual, and doing business as XOXO Entertainment, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $36,883.50.
Prejudgment Interest - 12,756.30.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $1,752.35.

Total - $51,392.15.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2020 Continued To Jan-05-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
